zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tozier於1659年4月出生在美國麻薩諸塞州約克霍利斯賽門 法爾斯時，她的父親Richard Tozer39歲，母親Judith Smith24歲。她於1693年與Richard Randall Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾達勒姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1704年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福享年45歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tozier于1659年4月出生在美国马萨诸塞州約克霍利斯賽門 法爾斯时，她的父亲Richard Tozer39岁，母亲Judith Smith24岁。她于1693年与Richard Randall Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾達勒姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1704年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福享年45岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福。

nameMeanings.name: Tozier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Tozer  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tozer
meanings: English (Devon): occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English tosen ‘to tease, card’ (Old English tāsian), for someone who teased or carded wool, flax, etc., so as to clean and separate the fibres.
Americanized form of Hungarian Tőzsér: occupational name for a dealer or tradesman, tőzsér, especially one selling cattle.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tozier was born in April 1659, in Salmon Falls, Hollis, York, Massachusetts, United States, her father, Richard Tozer, was 39 and her mother, Judith Smith, was 24. She married Richard Randall Jr. in 1693, in Durham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 16 April 1704, in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tozier est née en avril 1659, à Salmon Falls, Hollis, York, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Richard Tozer, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Judith Smith, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Randall Jr. en 1693, à Durham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1704, à Douvres, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Douvres, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tozier im April 1659 in Salmon Falls, Hollis, York, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Tozer 39 und ihre Mutter Judith Smith 24. Sie hat 1693 in Durham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Richard Randall Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. April 1704 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tozier è nata il nel aprile 1659 nel Salmon Falls, Hollis, York, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Richard Tozer, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Judith Smith, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard Randall Jr. nel 1693, nel Durham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 aprile 1704, nel Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tozierが1659年4月にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ヨークホーリスサルモン ファルズで生まれた時，父Richard Tozerは39歳，母Judith Smithは24歳であった。1693年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアダルハムでRichard Randall Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1704年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアドバーで45歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアドバーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tozier(이)가 1659년 4월 미국 매사추세츠 주 요르크 홀리스 살몬 팰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Tozer(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith Smith(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1693년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 뒤람에서 Richard Randall Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1704년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 도버에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 도버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tozier nasceu em abril de 1659, em Salmon Falls, Hollis, York, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Richard Tozer, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Judith Smith, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Randall Jr. em 1693, em Durham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de abril de 1704, em Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tozier родилась апрель 1659 г. в местности салмон фаллс, холлис, ерк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Richard Tozer было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Smith, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Randall Jr. в 1693 г. в местности дурам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 апреля 1704 г. в местности довир, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности довир, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tozier nació en abril de 1659, en Salmon Falls, Hollis, York, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Richard Tozer, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Judith Smith, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richard Randall Jr. en 1693, en Durham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de abril de 1704, en Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
